MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF CHAKESHA NASH-ROBERTSON.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Off calendar. Minutes from December 10, 2024 show that this motion was previously granted. Moving party shall email a proposed order on the Judicial Council form to CONTESTDEPT301TR@SFTC.ORG by the date of hearing.

MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Tim Vrastil 661-255-8300 for Moving party.

9:55am
Argued. Mr. Tim Vrastil present arguments.
9:59am The Court takes a recess.
10:00am After the recess. Court and Counsel continue discussion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Bish Law and Atty. Timothy Vrastil's Motion to be Relieved as Consel for PLAINTIFF CHAKESHA NASH-ROBERTSON. Granted. Mr. Vrastil to submit a proposed order on the judicial council form via email to the contestdept301tr@sftc.org today.
